---
name: sync-docs
description: Reconcile documentation and reference surfaces when implementation and supporting artifacts may be out of sync.
---

# Sync Docs

Use this skill when:

- docs or reference artifacts may be stale or misleading
- a change may have left implementation and documentation out of sync
- you need a reusable documentation-reconciliation workflow

## Workflow

1. Confirm what the system actually does.
2. Find the relevant `Follow-Through Triggers`.
3. Inventory affected docs and reference surfaces.
4. Update stale docs or explain why no update is needed.
5. Verify links, terminology, and source-of-truth references.
